title: Graduate-Level Argumentation
description: Steel-manning, charitable interpretation, load-bearing claims, productive disagreement.
summary_pt_br: Argumentação avançada: steel-man, interpretação caridosa, afirmações-chave, discordar produtivamente.

scenes.subtitle_en: Steel-manning, charitable interpretation, load-bearing claims, productive disagreement.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Argumentação avançada: steel-man, interpretação caridosa, afirmações-chave, discordar produtivamente.

scenes.text_en: Steel-manning, charitable interpretation, load-bearing claims, productive disagreement. Focus: graduate-level argumentation. Steel-manning means arguing the strongest version of their view.
scenes.text_pt: Argumentação avançada: steel-man, interpretação caridosa, afirmações-chave, discordar produtivamente. Foco: graduate-level argumentation. Steel-man é argumentar a versão mais forte do outro.

scenes.title: Graduate-Level Argumentation
scenes.body_en: Graduate argument: STEEL-MAN your opponent. Identify LOAD-BEARING claims (which would collapse if false). Accept CHARITABLE interpretations. Disagree productively by naming the crux.
scenes.body_pt: Argumentação avançada: steel-man, interpretação caridosa, afirmações-chave, discordar produtivamente.

examples.en: Steel-manning means arguing the strongest version of their view.
examples.pt: Steel-man é argumentar a versão mais forte do outro.

examples.en: Identify the load-bearing claim before you attack.
examples.pt: Identifique a afirmação estrutural antes de atacar.

examples.en: The crux is where we actually disagree.
examples.pt: O ponto é onde realmente discordamos.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ means arguing the strongest version of their view."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Steel-manning means arguing the strongest version of their view."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Steel-man é argumentar a versão mais forte do outro.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Identify the load-bearing claim before you attack.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Identify the load-bearing claim before you attack."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Identifique a afirmação estrutural antes de atacar.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Graduate-Level Argumentation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre graduate-level argumentation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Steel-man an argument you disagree with.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The one that, if false, collapses the whole.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Name the exact premise you reject.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Say what they got right first.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Graduate argument is discipline plus courage.

scenes.title: The dissertation defense prep
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize four moves of graduate argumentation. Use at least three terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In preparation for her thesis defense, Kumar coached his student through the hardest conversation of her life.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Steel-man every possible objection — argue the strongest version your committee could possibly raise.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Then I identify which of my own claims are load-bearing — if one falls, the whole chapter falls?

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Exactly. Protect those three. Concede everything peripheral generously, even before anyone attacks it.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: And when I disagree, I name the crux out loud — the exact premise I reject, not their conclusion.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A defended thesis, Kumar knew, is won or lost in the quiet discipline of knowing which claims you can afford to lose.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Graduate-Level Argumentation". Steel-manning, charitable interpretation, load-bearing claims, productive disagreement. Steel-manning means arguing the strongest version of their view. Identify the load-bearing claim before you attack. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Graduate-Level Argumentation". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
